files.patch:
@@ -1,19 +1,19 @@
+version: 2
+
 run:
   timeout: 3m
   tests: true
 
 linters:
   disable-all: true
-  enable:
+  disable:
     - errcheck
-    - gofumpt
+  enable:
     - govet
     - ineffassign
     - staticcheck
-    - typecheck
     - unused
 
 issues:
   max-issues-per-linter: 0
   max-same-issues: 0
-

@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ builds:
       - linux_amd64
       - linux_arm64
       - windows_amd64
+      - windows_arm64
 
 archives:
   - builds:
